LinkedSQL.SQL: (SELECT DD.DD_CO_NUMBER AS "D.DIV_CO_NUMBER" , DD.DD_DIV_NUMBER AS "D.DIV_NUMBER" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , DD.DD_SEQ AS "DD.DD_SEQ" , DD.DD_DIV_NUMBER AS "DD.DD_DIV_NUMBER" , DD.DD_PAYEE_DETAILS AS "DD.DD_PAYEE_DETAILS" , DD.DD_AMOUNT AS "DD.DD_AMOUNT" , DD.DD_AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "DD.DD_AMOUNT_CURRENCY" , DD.DD_PO_NUMBER AS "DD.DD_PO_NUMBER" , DD.DD_TOTAL_PO AS "DD.DD_TOTAL_PO" , DD.DD_TOTAL_PO_CURRENCY AS "DD.DD_TOTAL_PO_CURRENCY" , DD.ORA_ROWSCN AS "DD_ORA_ROWSCN" , AD.ORA_ROWSCN AS "AD_ORA_ROWSCN" , CP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM DEBT_DIVIDENDS DD , ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , CODED_PARTIES CP , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE DD.DD_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND AD.DEBT_SEQ = DD.DD_ALD_SEQ AND CP.PARTY_ID = AD.CP_CREDITOR_ID AND P.PARTY_ID = CP.PARTY_ID AND GA.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY' ) UNION ( SELECT DD.DD_CO_NUMBER AS "D.DIV_CO_NUMBER" , DD.DD_DIV_NUMBER AS "D.DIV_NUMBER" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , DD.DD_SEQ AS "DD.DD_SEQ" , DD.DD_DIV_NUMBER AS "DD.DD_DIV_NUMBER" , DD.DD_PAYEE_DETAILS AS "DD.DD_PAYEE_DETAILS" , DD.DD_AMOUNT AS "DD.DD_AMOUNT" , DD.DD_AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "DD.DD_AMOUNT_CURRENCY" , DD.DD_PO_NUMBER AS "DD.DD_PO_NUMBER" , DD.DD_TOTAL_PO AS "DD.DD_TOTAL_PO" , DD.DD_TOTAL_PO_CURRENCY AS "DD.DD_TOTAL_PO_CURRENCY" , DD.ORA_ROWSCN AS "DD_ORA_ROWSCN" , AD.ORA_ROWSCN AS "AD_ORA_ROWSCN" , NULL AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM DEBT_DIVIDENDS DD , ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE DD.DD_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND AD.DEBT_SEQ = DD.DD_ALD_SEQ AND GA.ALD_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND GA.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO CRED' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL)
